creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Dec 31, 2007 at 12:20:07PM +0000, edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: editors/vim: gvim shows Gtk-warning

Does gvim still run for you?  I.e., is the Gtk-warning just a warning,
or it keeps you from using Gvim?
What is the output of ldd on your vim binary?

I do not get this warning on my machine, so I'm wondering if you built
Vim with a particular set of WANT_* or options.

-- 
-- David  (obrien@FreeBSD.org)
